rewritten_ticket.rewritten_title: [Checkout] Submit Order times out on Chrome
rewritten_ticket.rewritten_description:
## Description
The checkout submit action times out after the user clicks Submit Order.

## Environment
Windows 11, Chrome 124

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open checkout.
2. Add a valid address.
3. Click Submit Order.

## Expected Result
The order is submitted and the confirmation page appears.

## Actual Result
The button shows a spinner for 30 seconds and then displays 'Payment request timed out'.
improvements_made: Structured the report into standard bug sections.
Preserved only user-provided environment and error details.
